|desc=Olympia's {{p|Meowstic}} appeared in ''[[XY092|Cloudy Fate, Bright Future!]]'', where they sent {{TRT}} blasting off. They appeared again in ''[[XY093|All Eyes on the Future!]]'', where they were used by Olympia in her Gym battle against {{Ash}}. Both went up against {{AP|Frogadier}} and {{AP|Talonflame}}, and eventually lost.

Her male Meowstic provides the stat boosts and defense in battle, while Olympia's female Meowstic often goes on the offensive.

They reappeared in ''[[XY116|The Synchronicity Test!]]'' in a flashback.

They reappeared in ''[[XY132|A Towering Takeover!]]'', where they were seen watching [[Lysandre]]'s broadcast from [[Lumiose City]] along with Olympia.

They reappeared in ''[[XY135|Rocking Kalos Defenses!]]'' and ''[[XY136|Forming a More Perfect Union!]]'', where they helped destroy the [[Giant Rock]].

They reappeared in a flashback in ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]''.

The male Meowstic's known moves are {{m|Helping Hand}}, {{m|Light Screen}}, and {{m|Psyshock}}, and his Ability is {{a|Prankster}}.

The female Meowstic's known moves are {{m|Future Sight}}, {{m|Dark Pulse}}, {{m|Psyshock}}, and {{m|Thunder Wave}}, and her Ability is {{a|Keen Eye}}.}}
